mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates reduce discount rates for equity valuations, driving positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, causing negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive returns in >60% of triggered instances despite negative signal direction.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient insignificant in multivariate regression over 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production above its 2017 baseline indicates robust manufacturing capacity utilization, generating positive short-term equity momentum during expansion phases.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power when inflation exceeds 3% annually.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with stagnant federal funds rates triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when inflation exceeds 2.5% and rates are unchanged.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects sustained economic expansion and corporate earnings growth, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth falling below 2% signals weakening aggregate demand and reduced corporate profit margins, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive returns in >55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising industrial production and falling unemployment indicates productive economic growth without labor market overheating, supporting positive short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to outperform baseline in walk-forward testing over 2-year windows.
